_meta.resume_note: Audited the official 2025-2026 catalog's complete Programs Offered table and catalog addendum. Neither contains a general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS.

none_found_sources.locator: Programs Offered, catalog pages 61-62; the complete award table has no Economics program
New Programs, catalog addendum page 16; no Economics award is added

notes: The complete 2025-2026 Programs Offered matrix lists every AA, AS, AA-T, and AS-T but no Economics award. Economics appears only as coursework and within adjacent programs such as Business and Liberal Arts: Social & Behavioral Sciences, which are outside this pass.
